models.note: Extended thinking enabled, budget=8000 tokens. Same base model as claude-sonnet-4-6.
Gemini 3 Flash — always-on thinking at model default level (HIGH).
Gemini 3 Flash Lite — always-on thinking, lighter/faster variant.
Gemini 3 Flash with thinking_level=MINIMAL (explicit low-budget thinking).
GLM-5 with optional thinking mode enabled (Anthropic-compatible thinking blocks).
GLM-Z1-Flash — always-on reasoning model; thinking output stripped from response.
